page_metadata.biotools__summary: Software package for finding mutation regions where the input individuals are closely related, but the pedigree is not given. It takes the genotype data on a chromosome as well as the disease status for a set of input individuals without any pedigree information and outputs the predicted mutation regions.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Software package for finding mutation regions where the input individuals are closely related, but the pedigree is not given. It takes the genotype data on a chromosome as well as the disease status for a set of input individuals without any pedigree information and outputs the predicted mutation regions.
